item.name: Hyphalosaurus
item.description:
A slippery reptile that can steer its way through Deepmoat's currents with a swish of its sizable tail.

[Suitable for printing on extra large canvases.]

fish.guide: Aptly named the “submerged lizard,” this lanky specimen utilizes its flat, elongated tail as a fin, allowing it to glide through the freshwater depths with relative ease.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - Ilsabard and the Northern Empty
